Sql:
CREATE TABLE umbracoElement
(
 "nodeId" INTEGER NOT NULL
, "published" INTEGER NOT NULL
, "edited" INTEGER NOT NULL
, CONSTRAINT PK_umbracoElement PRIMARY KEY ("nodeId")
, CONSTRAINT FK_umbracoElement_umbracoContent_nodeId FOREIGN KEY ("nodeId") REFERENCES "umbracoContent" ("nodeId")  
)

CREATE TABLE umbracoElementVersion
(
 "id" INTEGER NOT NULL
, "published" INTEGER NOT NULL
, CONSTRAINT PK_umbracoElementVersion PRIMARY KEY ("id")
, CONSTRAINT FK_umbracoElementVersion_umbracoContentVersion_id FOREIGN KEY ("id") REFERENCES "umbracoContentVersion" ("id")  
)

CREATE TABLE umbracoElementCultureVariation
(
 "id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT
, "nodeId" INTEGER NOT NULL
, "languageId" INTEGER NOT NULL
, "edited" INTEGER NOT NULL
, "available" INTEGER NOT NULL
, "published" INTEGER NOT NULL
, "name" TEXT COLLATE NOCASE NULL
, CONSTRAINT PK_umbracoElementCultureVariation UNIQUE ("id")
, CONSTRAINT FK_umbracoElementCultureVariation_umbracoNode_id FOREIGN KEY ("nodeId") REFERENCES "umbracoNode" ("id")  
, CONSTRAINT FK_umbracoElementCultureVariation_umbracoLanguage_id FOREIGN KEY ("languageId") REFERENCES "umbracoLanguage" ("id")  
)
ALTER TABLE "cmsContentType" ADD "allowedInLibrary" INTEGER NOT NULL CONSTRAINT "DF_cmsContentType_allowedInLibrary" DEFAULT ('0')
ALTER TABLE "umbracoUserGroup" ADD "description" TEXT COLLATE NOCASE NULL

CREATE TABLE umbracoDocumentUrlAlias
(
 "id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT
, "uniqueId" TEXT NOT NULL
, "languageId" INTEGER NULL
, "alias" TEXT COLLATE NOCASE NOT NULL
, CONSTRAINT PK_umbracoDocumentUrlAlias UNIQUE ("id")
, CONSTRAINT FK_umbracoDocumentUrlAlias_umbracoNode_uniqueId FOREIGN KEY ("uniqueId") REFERENCES "umbracoNode" ("uniqueId")  
, CONSTRAINT FK_umbracoDocumentUrlAlias_umbracoLanguage_id FOREIGN KEY ("languageId") REFERENCES "umbracoLanguage" ("id")  
)

Sql:
CREATE TABLE umbracoDocumentUrl
(
 "id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT
, "uniqueId" TEXT NOT NULL
, "isDraft" INTEGER NOT NULL
, "languageId" INTEGER NULL
, "urlSegment" TEXT COLLATE NOCASE NOT NULL
, "isPrimary" INTEGER NOT NULL CONSTRAINT "DF_umbracoDocumentUrl_isPrimary" DEFAULT ('1')
, CONSTRAINT PK_umbracoDocumentUrl UNIQUE ("id")
, CONSTRAINT FK_umbracoDocumentUrl_umbracoNode_uniqueId FOREIGN KEY ("uniqueId") REFERENCES "umbracoNode" ("uniqueId")  
, CONSTRAINT FK_umbracoDocumentUrl_umbracoLanguage_id FOREIGN KEY ("languageId") REFERENCES "umbracoLanguage" ("id")  
)

CREATE TABLE umbracoDocumentUrlAlias
(
 "id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT
, "uniqueId" TEXT NOT NULL
, "languageId" INTEGER NULL
, "alias" TEXT COLLATE NOCASE NOT NULL
, CONSTRAINT PK_umbracoDocumentUrlAlias UNIQUE ("id")
, CONSTRAINT FK_umbracoDocumentUrlAlias_umbracoNode_uniqueId FOREIGN KEY ("uniqueId") REFERENCES "umbracoNode" ("uniqueId")  
, CONSTRAINT FK_umbracoDocumentUrlAlias_umbracoLanguage_id FOREIGN KEY ("languageId") REFERENCES "umbracoLanguage" ("id")  
)

Sql:
CREATE TABLE umbracoExternalMember
(
 "id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT
, "key" TEXT NOT NULL
, "email" TEXT COLLATE NOCASE NOT NULL
, "userName" TEXT COLLATE NOCASE NOT NULL
, "name" TEXT COLLATE NOCASE NULL
, "isApproved" INTEGER NOT NULL CONSTRAINT "DF_umbracoExternalMember_isApproved" DEFAULT ('1')
, "isLockedOut" INTEGER NOT NULL CONSTRAINT "DF_umbracoExternalMember_isLockedOut" DEFAULT ('0')
, "lastLoginDate" TEXT NULL
, "lastLockoutDate" TEXT NULL
, "createDate" TEXT NOT NULL CONSTRAINT "DF_umbracoExternalMember_createDate" DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
, "updateDate" TEXT NOT NULL CONSTRAINT "DF_umbracoExternalMember_updateDate" DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
, "securityStamp" TEXT COLLATE NOCASE NULL
, "profileData" TEXT COLLATE NOCASE NULL
, CONSTRAINT PK_umbracoExternalMember UNIQUE ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE umbracoExternalMember2MemberGroup
(
 "externalMemberId" INTEGER NOT NULL
, "memberGroupId" INTEGER NOT NULL
, CONSTRAINT PK_umbracoExternalMember2MemberGroup PRIMARY KEY ("externalMemberId", "memberGroupId")
, CONSTRAINT FK_umbracoExternalMember2MemberGroup_umbracoExternalMember_id FOREIGN KEY ("externalMemberId") REFERENCES "umbracoExternalMember" ("id")  
, CONSTRAINT FK_umbracoExternalMember2MemberGroup_umbracoNode_id FOREIGN KEY ("memberGroupId") REFERENCES "umbracoNode" ("id")  
)
